      rw [h6]

      have h7 : |y ^ 2 + y * x + x ^ 2| ≤ |y ^ 2| + |y * x| + |x ^ 2| := by
        apply abs_add_le
        all_goals try { apply abs_add }
        all_goals try { apply abs_mul }
      have h8 : |y ^ 2| + |y * x| + |x ^ 2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
        have h9 : |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := by simp [abs_pow]
        have h10 : |y * x| = |y| * |x| := by simp [abs_mul]
        have h11 : |x ^ 2| = |x| ^ 2 := by simp [abs_pow]
        rw [h9, h10, h11]
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|y| - |x| : ℝ), sq_nonneg (|y| + |x| : ℝ), sq_nonneg (|x| : ℝ)]
      linarith
    have h7 : |y ^ 2 + y * x + x ^ 2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h6
    have h8 : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := h4

have h1 : ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) > 0 := by
      apply div_pos

      have h2 : (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) > 0 := by

  -- We need to show that for any y such that |y - x| < δ, we have |y^3 - x^3| < ε.
  intro y hy
  have h1 : |y - x| < δ := by simpa using hy
  have h2 : |y^3 - x^3| < ε := by
    have h3 : |y^3 - x^3| = |y - x| * |y^2 + y*x + x^2| := by
      have h4 : y^3 - x^3 = (y - x) * (y^2 + y*x + x^2) := by ring
      rw [h4]
      simp [abs_mul]
      <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
    have h4 : |y^2 + y*x + x^2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have h5 : y^2 + y*x + x^2 = (y + x/2)^2 + 3/4 * x^2 := by ring_nf
      rw [h5]
      have h6 : |(y + x/2)^2 + 3/4 * x^2| = (y + x/2)^2 + 3/4 * x^2 := by
        apply abs_of_nonneg
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y + x/2), sq_nonneg x]
      rw [h6]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y - x), sq_nonneg (y + x), abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, sq_nonneg (y^2 - x^2)]
    have h5 : |y - x| < δ := by simpa using h1
    have h6 : |y - x| * |y^2 + y*x + x^2| < ε := by
      have h7 : |y^2 + y*x + x^2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h4
      have h8 : |y - x| < δ := h1
      have h9 : δ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := δle2
      have h10 : 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 > 0 := by
        have h11 : |x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg x
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x|), sq_nonneg (|x| + 1)]
      have h11 : |y - x| < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        linarith [h8, h9]
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x), abs_nonneg (y^2 + y*x + x^2), h7, h11, h10]
    linarith [h3, h6]
  simpa using h2

      cases' abs_cases y with hy1 hy1 <;> cases' abs_cases x with hx1 hx1 <;> 
        try { 
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y + x), sq_nonneg (y - x), sq_nonneg (x), sq_nonneg (y)] 
        }
    have h7 : - (y ^ 2 + x * y + x ^ 2) ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      cases' abs_cases y with hy1 hy1 <;> cases' abs_cases x with hx1 hx1 <;> 
        try { 
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg (y + x), sq_nonneg (y - x), sq_nonneg (x), sq_nonneg (y)] 
        }
    apply abs_le.mpr
    constructor <;> nlinarith
  have h5 : |y ^ 3 - x ^ 3| = |y - x| * |y ^ 2 + x * y + x ^ 2| := by
    have h6 : y ^ 3 - x ^ 3 = (y - x) * (y ^ 2 + x * y + x ^ 2) := by
      ring
    rw [h6]
    simp [abs_mul]
  have h6 : |y ^ 3 - x ^ 3| < ε := by
    have h7 : |y ^ 2 + x * y + x ^ 2| ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := h4
    have h8 : |y - x| * |y ^ 2 + x * y + x ^ 2| < ε := by
      have h9 : |y - x| < δ := h1
      have h10 : δ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := δle2
      have h11 : 0 < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := pos2
      have h12 : |y - x| * |y ^ 2 + x * y + x ^ 2| ≤ |y - x| * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
        linarith [h7]
        all_goals
          cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h13 h13 <;> try { linarith }
      have h13 : |y - x| * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) < ε := by
        have h14 : |y - x| < δ := h1
        have h15 : δ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := δle2
        have h16 : 0 < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := pos2
        have h17 : |y - x| * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) < δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right
          linarith [h14]
          all_goals
            nlinarith [show 0 < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 by positivity]
        have h18 : δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) ≤ ε := by
          have h19 : δ ≤ ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := δle2
          have h20 : 0 < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := pos2
          have h21 : δ * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) ≤ (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
            apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
            linarith [h19]
            all_goals
              nlinarith [show 0 ≤ 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 by positivity]
          have h22 : (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) * (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) = ε := by
            field_simp [show 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 ≠ 0 by positivity]
          linarith [h21, h22]
        linarith [h17, h18]
      linarith [h12, h13]
    linarith [h5, h8]
  simpa using h6
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:

cases min_cases 1 (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) with
    | inl h =>
      rw [h]
      norm_num
    | inr h =>
      rw [h]
      have h1 : 0 < (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 : ℝ) := by
        have h2 : 0 ≤ |x| := abs_nonneg x
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x| : ℝ), sq_nonneg ((|x| + 1 : ℝ)), abs_nonneg x]
      have h2 : ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) > 0 := by
        apply div_pos
        linarith
        linarith
      linarith
  exact δpos
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:

have h1 : ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) > 0 := by
    apply div_pos
    linarith
    have h2 : 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 > 0 := by
      have h3 : |x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg x
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x|), sq_nonneg (|x| + 1)]
    linarith
  cases min_cases 1 (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) with
  | inl h =>
    rw [h]
    all_goals linarith
  | inr h =>
    rw [h]
    all_goals linarith
  all_goals linarith

have h1 : 0 < ε := hε
    have h2 : 0 < 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by
      have h3 : 0 ≤ |x| := abs_nonneg x
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|x|), sq_nonneg (|x| + 1)]
    have h4 : 0 < ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
      apply div_pos
      exact h1
      all_goals linarith [h2]
    cases min_cases 1 (ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)) with
    | inl h =>
      -- Case where 1 ≤ ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1)
      have h5 : δ = 1 := by
        linarith [h]
      rw [h5]
      all_goals norm_num
    | inr h =>
      -- Case where ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) < 1
      have h5 : δ = ε / (3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1) := by
        linarith [h]
      rw [h5]
      all_goals linarith [h4]
  exact δpos
  all_goals try { tauto }
  all_goals try { nlinarith }
